items.title: Is Palantir Technologies Stock Finally a Buy?
items.summary: Palantir Technologies stock has declined 30% in 2026 despite strong fundamentals. While trading at a premium valuation (P/E of 134), the company's 85% revenue growth and 154% earnings growth significantly outpace the tech sector average. With $11.8 billion in remaining deal value and robust demand for its AI software platforms, the article suggests the pullback presents a buying opportunity for long-term investors in the expanding AI software market.
